name: NexCampus v2.3.5
changelog: Code Lab projects now work out of the box — all input() replaced with hardcoded examples
JavaScript runs directly in the browser — no Node.js required
Solar System overhaul — 900 stars with color tints, vignette, dashed orbits, multi-layer sun, nebula clouds
Search bar — find any tool instantly from the sidebar (press Esc to clear)
Self-update fully automatic — installs to ~/.nexcampus/, updates desktop entry, restarts seamlessly
HiDPI canvas rendering — crisp on all displays
Desktop shortcut auto-created on Linux and Windows
